description: File Formulario Virtual 616 monthly tax declaration for 4ta categoria workers

ingresoPEN.description: Total monthly income in PEN. System calculates 8% tax.

retenciones.description: 4ta categoria withholdings received (usually 0 for foreign employers)

flags.--dry-run: Preview the declaration without submitting to SUNAT

auth: Requires Nueva Plataforma session. Run 'sunat login --nueva-plataforma' first.
